{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/186373426?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/q1uf3ng", "id": 186373426, "login": "q1uf3ng", "node_id": "U_kgDOCxvVMg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/q1uf3ng", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:H/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "The `actionRenderCardPreview()` method in `FieldsController` passes the `fieldLayoutConfig` POST parameter directly to `Fields::createLayout()` without calling `Component::cleanseConfig()`. This allows Yii2 event handler injection via `on eventName` keys in the config array, leading to arbitrary code execution.

This is the same vulnerability pattern that was fixed in GHSA-4484-8v2f-5748 (same file, `_fldComponent` method correctly uses `cleanseConfig`), GHSA-qx2q-q59v-wf3j (EntryTypesController), and GHSA-2fph-6v5w-89hh (ElementIndexesController).

## PoC

As an admin user with a valid session:

```
POST /admin/actions/fields/render-card-preview HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Cookie: CraftSessionId=<session>

fieldLayoutConfig[on+init]=phpinfo&CRAFT_CSRF_TOKEN=<token>
```

When the FieldLayout object is constructed, Yii2 processes the `on init` key as an event handler registration. During `Component::init()`, the `init` event is triggered, calling `phpinfo()`. The phpinfo output (which includes environment variables, potentially containing database credentials and `CRAFT_SECURITY_KEY`) will appear in the response.

## Impact

An authenticated admin can achieve RCE through Yii2 event handler injection. While this requires admin access (same as GHSA-4484-8v2f-5748, which was rated moderate), it allows arbitrary PHP function execution and information disclosure via phpinfo.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/craftcms/cms/security/advisories/GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/craftcms/cms/security-advisories/GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/craftcms/cms", "summary": "Craft CMS: RCE via missing cleanseConfig in FieldsController::actionRenderCardPreview", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T13:44:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-86vw-x4ww-x467", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.9.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "craftcms/cms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.5.0, <= 5.9.13"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Craft CMS: RCE via missing cleanseConfig in FieldsController::actionRenderCardPreview
